title: 1 Liter Glass Water Bottle with Stainless Steel Lid - 1000ml Sports Drinking Bottle with Time Marker, Reusable Shatterproof Silicone Case Bottle for Fitness Gym Outdoor Travel Workout (Dark Blue)
features: Premium Glass Water Bottle – Crafted from high-quality glass, this water bottle is tough and can handle temperature extremes from cold to hot, from -10 °C to 120 °C. It maintains its strength over time and does not retain any smells, making it ideal for daily use.

Leak-Proof Stainless Steel Lid – Equipped with a sturdy stainless steel lid, this bottle provides a stronger hold on water than lids made of plastic or bamboo, ensuring no leaks. The top-quality seal keeps your drink inside, so you can carry it with confidence.

Time Marker Water Bottle – Marked with times to help you drink water throughout the day, this 1000ml bottle is perfect for keeping you well-hydrated. It's an effective reminder to drink consistently, so you can stay refreshed from morning to evening.

1L Glass Water Bottle – Opt for this reusable water bottle as a responsible alternative to disposable plastic. It has a large 1-liter capacity to help you meet your daily water intake needs easily. The material is free from BPA, ensuring your water tastes clean and fresh every time.

Suitable for Various Occasions – Whether you're hitting the gym, attending a yoga class, or heading outdoors, this water bottle is a great fit for any situation. Its practical design and protective silicone sleeve make it a reliable companion for all kinds of activities.
description: Product Description 1L Glass Water Bottle Product Details Premium Glass Water Bottle This glass water bottle is made of high-quality glass material, durable, resistant to dropping, and free of Bisphenol A (BPA). Time Marker Water Bottle Marked with times to help you drink water throughout the day, this 1000ml bottle is perfect for keeping you well-hydrated. Leak-Proof Stainless Steel Lid Equipped with a sturdy stainless steel lid, this bottle provides a stronger hold on water than lids made of plastic or bamboo, ensuring no leaks. Non-Slip Silicone Sleeve Provides a secure grip and added protection against breakage, combining safety with durability. It's an effective reminder to drink consistently, so you can stay refreshed from morning to evening. Suitable for Various Occasions Whether you're hitting the gym, attending a yoga class, or heading outdoors, this water bottle is a great fit for any situation. Its practical design and protective silicone sleeve make it a reliable companion for all kinds of activities.
